# llms.txt for Mobile Device Testing Tools
# URL: https://mobiledevice.github.io
# Description: Free browser-based diagnostic suite for testing smartphone hardware features

## Website Overview
This is a client-side web application that provides 14+ hardware diagnostic tests for mobile devices. All tests run locally in the browser with no app installation, no account creation, and no cost.

## Quick Links
- Homepage: https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- All Tests Index: https://mobiledevice.github.io/

## Individual Test Tools
- Camera Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/camera-test
- Microphone Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/mic-test
- Speaker Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/speaker-test
- Touch Screen Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/swipe-test
- Display & Dead Pixel Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/display-test
- Vibration Motor Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/vibration-test
- Motion Sensor Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/sensor-test
- Battery Health Check: https://mobiledevice.github.io/battery-test
- GPS & Location Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/gps-test
- Bluetooth Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/bluetooth-test
- Flashlight & Light Sensor Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/flashlight-test
- On-Screen Keyboard Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/keyboard-test
- Physical Button Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/button-test
- Network Speed Test: https://mobiledevice.github.io/network-speed-test

## Key Features
- **Zero Setup**: No app installation required - https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- **Privacy-First**: Tests run locally, data never leaves your device - https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- **Free**: No tiers, trials, or paywalls - https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- **Cross-Platform**: Works on any modern mobile browser - https://mobiledevice.github.io/

## Common Use Cases
- Pre-purchase phone inspection: https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- Post-repair verification: https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- Warranty claim documentation: https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- New device out-of-box testing: https://mobiledevice.github.io/
- Hardware vs. software troubleshooting: https://mobiledevice.github.io/

## API Information
This is a client-side web application that uses browser APIs:
- MediaDevices API (camera/microphone)
- Web Audio API (speaker tests)
- Touch Events API (screen tests)
- Generic Sensor API (motion sensors)
- Battery Status API
- Geolocation API
- Web Bluetooth API
- Network Information API

All tests are available at: https://mobiledevice.github.io/
